---
title: "Articles"
description: "" 
listing:

  - id: published-papers
    include: 
      type: 
      - "Article"
      - "Chapter"
    contents: papers.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    page-size: 300 # stops it from adding pagination w/20+ articles
    categories: true  


toc: false   
page-layout: article
css: |
  .quarto-toc, .quarto-categories {
    font-size: 1.2em;  # Adjust this value as needed
  }
---

# Articles and Book Chapters

(Select a research topic from the list to filter by subject)

## 

::: {#published-papers}
:::

##
